name: $1 Factory & Studio
one_liner: An experimental playbook + studio for generating $1-decision micro-products — tiny tools that print micro-revenue.
notes: Onboarded 2026-05-19. Folder contains $1 Factory subdir, GTM Framework, Recipes, and a nested TASFORT (reconcile with standalone TASFORT product). This is conceptually a meta-product / studio. Treat it as the precursor to this factory itself — extract learnings, archive what's superseded.
